import string
import io

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  mut x = a
  mut y = b
  while y != 0
    let r = x % y
    x = y
    y = r
  end
  x
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut start = -1

while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if is_ws(b)
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if start >= 0
  let tok = string.substring(input, start, n)
  match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(v)
    tokens = __list_int_push(tokens, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let aopt = tokens.get(0)
let bopt = tokens.get(1)

match aopt
when Some(a)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    let g = gcd(a, b)
    println("gcd=#{g}")
  when None
    println("gcd=0")
  end
when None
  println("gcd=0")
end
